case_title: VALENTIN L. SANCHEZ VS. KRISTI RENEE LITTLE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,694.33 FILED BY SANCHEZ, VALENTIN L. AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE, KRISTI RENEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.00) SERVED NOV-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE, KRISTI RENEE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LITTLE, KRISTI RENEE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-17-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, VALENTIN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITTLE, KRISTI RENEE $3,694.33 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,824.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE, KRISTI RENEE
